task_completion.description: Extract last and first names into new columns
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for new columns named 'Last_Name' and 'First_Name' containing the separated names of the employees, with no obvious leading or trailing spaces.

task_completion.description: Create a Clean_Title column with proper case
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a new column named 'Clean_Title' where the job titles are formatted in Proper Case (e.g., 'Police Officer' instead of 'POLICE OFFICER').

Look for a new column named 'Total_Compensation' containing numerical values representing annual pay. Evidence of a formula handling both salaried (direct annual salary) and hourly (rate * hours * 52) employees should be visible in the formula bar or script.

task_completion.description: Create a new sheet named Department_Summary
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the sheet tabs at the bottom of the spreadsheet application to verify a new tab named 'Department_Summary' exists.

task_completion.description: Add correct headers to the summary table
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Department_Summary' sheet, look for a table with exactly these column headers: 'Department', 'Headcount', and 'Avg_Compensation'.

task_completion.description: Populate summary table with aggregated department data
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Department_Summary' sheet, look for rows corresponding to POLICE, FIRE, STREETS & SAN, WATER MGMNT, and AVIATION, along with their calculated headcount and average compensation values.
